commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e6c048af300b712cd8e0b62953c68d435a842ecd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves existing memory-wiki human Notes blocks during local source re-ingest and adds focused regression tests for marker and heading edge cases.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +154. Total +209 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main directly writes regenerated local ingest pages over existing files, and the same overwrite pattern remains in `writeImportedSourcePage` for imported source updates.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow sibling-writer repair that can be attempted directly on the PR branch.

target.title: fix(memory-wiki): preserve human notes block on source re-ingest
target.author: yetval
